description: Generate a candidate region manifest for a RUNECHAIN world region. Produces a JSON object conforming to the season.json region schema that the validator suite can accept.
prompt_template:
You are generating a candidate region manifest for the RUNECHAIN game world.

RUNECHAIN is a browser MMO where the world is oval and radial, decaying inward toward a singularity called the Wound. The aesthetic is ledger-punk: debt, record-keeping, Chainwell (a blockchain metaphor), RUNE (in-world currency that buys power), Gold (cosmetics only). Tone is dry, foreboding, occasionally sardonic.

Produce a JSON object representing ONE new region that could slot into the season manifest. The object must match this shape:

{
  "id": "<kebab-case-id>",
  "name": "<Human-readable name>",
  "tileset": "tileset-<id>",
  "position": { "x": <number>, "y": <number> },
  "exits": [
    { "to": "<existing-region-id>", "direction": "north|south|east|west" }
  ],
  "entities": [
    { "id": "<id>", "type": "hearth|dungeon-portal|platformer-portal|secret|npc|landmark", "pos": { "x": 0, "y": 0 }, "label": "<label>", "refId": "<optional>" }
  ],
  "platformerSections": []
}

Existing region IDs you can connect to: gracefall-parish, mempool-moor, shroud-vaults, drowned-reach, seized-grounds, archive-causeway.

Rules:
- The region name and id must be unique and RUNECHAIN-flavored (ledger metaphors, debt imagery, Chainwell references).
- Include at least one hearth entity if the region is inhabited, or none if it is ruined/consumed.
- Position the region on the radial map: x in [-8, 8], y in [-6, 6]. The Wound is at approximately x=5, y=1.
- Decay increases toward the Wound; choose hearthBrightness accordingly (0.0 = cold, 1.0 = fully lit).
- Return ONLY the JSON object, no prose, no markdown fences.
